title: Do recurring Google Calendar events create an infinite loop via the GCal to Monday integration recipe?
excerpt: Can anybody tell me how the Monday.com Google Calendar integration (GCal to Monday recipe) handles recurring GCal events in Monday? Ie does the Integration instantly create an Item in Monday for every occurrence ad infin…

posts.author: botsquad (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can anybody tell me how the Monday.com Google Calendar integration (GCal to Monday recipe) handles recurring GCal events in Monday? Ie does the Integration instantly create an Item in Monday for every occurrence ad infinitum?

Thanks in advance,
Patrick

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@botsquad ,
The Monday.com Google Calendar integration (GCal to Monday recipe) does not create an item in Monday for every occurrence of a recurring Google Calendar event. Instead, it creates a single item in Monday for the recurring event, and then updates that item with the details of each occurrence as it happens. This means that you only have one item to manage in Monday, even if the recurring event has many occurrences

Hope its helpful,

MSquare Support
